case_title: SILVIA VALLE ET AL VS. THE SAN FRANCISCO SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALLE, SILVIA ALVAREZ, XOCHIH AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALLE, SILVIA ALVAREZ, XOCHIH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS THERE WAS NO EVIDENCE THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFFS OR THAT DEFENDANT'S TREATMENT OF PLAINTIFFS' DOG, OLIVER, FELL BELOW THE STANDARD OF CARE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VALLE, SILVIA ALVAREZ, XOCHIH AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
